name: bleeding-deacons/confur
description: Automated collation of answers to questions for conference

version: php -r "echo 'Current plugin version: ' . (file_exists('Confur.php') && preg_match('/Version:\s*([0-9.]+)/', file_get_contents('Confur.php'), \$m) ? \$m[1] : 'unknown') . PHP_EOL;"

scripts-descriptions.build: Clean build directory and create production-ready plugin archive
scripts-descriptions.build:dev: Clean and create development archive with test files
scripts-descriptions.clean: Remove the build directory and all archives
scripts-descriptions.version: Display the current plugin version from main file
scripts-descriptions.help: Display detailed build script help and usage
